expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded background color (#ffffff, white, #f7f7f7)
expectations.evidence: No hardcoded backgrounds — all surface styling delegated to .c-glass-card engine class

expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded border colors (#e0e0e0, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Uses var(--border-default) and var(--border-glass) throughout — no hex border colors

expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded text colors (#1a1a1a, #555, #888, #333)
expectations.evidence: All colors use tokens: var(--color-text-main), var(--color-text-muted), var(--color-primary)

expectations.text: Output uses at least 3 var(--) token references
Agent references .c-glass-card engine class (as a comment or template note) rather than rewriting glass styles from scratch
expectations.evidence: Header comment line 8: Usage in template: <div class='supplier-card c-glass-card'>. Phase 1 note confirms engine class discovered and composed.

expectations.text: Output uses logical properties (padding-inline, padding-block, margin-block, border-block)
expectations.evidence: padding-block: 1.75rem 1.5rem; padding-inline: 1.5rem; margin-block-end: 1rem; margin-block-start: 0.75rem; border-block-start: 1px solid var(--border-default)
